prompt:
9:16 vertical, high-precision 3D CG oriental fantasy female character close-up poster. 3D CG oriental fantasy beauty portrait, anime-style 3D CG character art. The subject is a young oriental fantasy woman, visual age about 20–26 years old. The overall temperament is cold, ethereal, soft, and dreamy, with a sense of mystery like a sea spirit or moon goddess. This is high-quality 3D CG character rendering with exquisite modeling and cinematic lighting. 

Exquisite oriental face, smooth oval shape, cold white skin with delicate water droplets and highlights. Large clear eyes with a mix of ice blue and light silver blue. Long curly lashes and soft eye makeup. Elegant nose and soft peach-pink lips.

Hairstyle is ice white and silver white short curly hair with light blue highlights and fluid-like ends. High-precision hair modeling with a wet luster. Floating diagonal composition, body leaning back as if floating between a sea of stars and water. One arm raised elegantly over the forehead. Focusing on the side face, collarbone, and wet hair strands. 

Clothing is a white and ice blue oriental fantasy gown with translucent gauze, pearlescent textures, and blue gemstone inlays. Background is a cosmic water environment with deep blue, purple, and nebula pink colors. Cinematic cold white main light with blue-purple ambient light. High-end 3D CG virtual character poster quality.
